title: Export and save D1 database
excerpt: description: Send invoice when shopping cart is checked out and paid for image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Export a D1 database into R2 storage with Workflows In this example, we implement a Workflow that runs on a schedule using the `schedules` field on the Workflow binding. That Workflow initiates a backup for a D1 database using the REST API, and then stores the SQL dump in an [R2](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2) bucket.
